title: Blackspur BB-FB101 Fire Blanket
features: Ideal for small kitchens or caravans
Protective outer bag with hanging hole
CE approved and conforms to BS EN1869:1997
description: Product Description Blackspur fire blanket Manufactured from 100 degrees glass fabric, this blanket is ideal for use in most kitchens, homes and caravans to smother small fires such as chip pan fires. It comes packed in a protective outer bag with hanging key hole for easy storage. Conforms to BS EN 1869:1997. Note this blanket is not an adequate size for adult clothing fires. Size: 1m x 1m. Supplied in hanging colour box. Supplying quality products. One of the most comprehensive ranges of hand tools and DIY associated products in the UK. Safety Warning Please read all product packaging literature and product labels before use. Box Contains 1x Fire Blanket See more
